meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - Finding your Strengths - Week 3
meta.description:
Week 3 of Air Force Basic Training is where mental preparation for combat begins as well as the other elements of being in active duty. Future Airmen receive their 2nd uniform and name tapes, all of which are appraised during the week to ensure the recruits are meeting the high standards of the Air Force.
Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your app every week. 

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
